case_title: VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. VS. AMERICAN SALON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2014 - SHAW CHASON APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES, INC.; DEFENDANT MICHELLE NGO APPEARS AS OWNER OF DEFENDANT AMERICAN SALON; THE COURT ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER-30-2014 BY HON. DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506). ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES (DEPT. 506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SALON $678.64 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $828.64, *****CORRECTED JUDGMENT***** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SALON $678.64 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $708.64, (NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $678.64 FILED BY VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 120.00 - SERVED NOV-12-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SALON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2014 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF(BY MR. SHAW CHASEN) AND DEFENDANT (BY MS. MICHELLE NGO) APPEAR. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
